notes: Opening-window boards must not collapse into an immediate tactical finish under the local Stockfish smoke check.
Near-miss opening boards must stay free of immediate tactical termination.
Preemption nasty negatives must remain tactically sane.
Distributed-contact exact rows should stay calm enough to test multi-sector contact rather than a large material or tactical edge.
Central-only contact near misses should stay calm enough to isolate the missing outer-sector contact boundary.
Contested-only distributed fronts must remain tactically sane.
Endgame race rows must not be immediate tactical mates.
One-sided runner near misses must remain outside trivial mates.
Blockaded race negatives must remain outside trivial mates.
Attack scaffold boards must show pressure without collapsing into an immediate forced mate.
Off-theater attack near misses must not be trivial mates.
Carrier-only attack negatives must remain tactically sane.
Fortress exact boards should stay outside immediate mate and outside large tactical eval spikes.
Fortress near misses should stay calm enough to test shell occupancy rather than tactics.
Fortress direct-entry negatives should stay calm enough to isolate the entry-law failure.
King-safety exact boards may be sharp, but must not already be an immediate forced mate.
Single-hole near misses should stay calm enough to validate the hole-count boundary rather than a tactical shot.
Non-adjacent-hole negatives must not be immediate mates.
Central-contact exact rows should stay calm enough to test the connected central front itself rather than a separate eval spike.
Single-touch central rows must not be immediate mates.
Contested-only central rows must remain tactically sane.
Certification-row engine bundles anchor comparative development verdicts without tying truth to one numeric score.
Near-miss development rows still need an engine bundle because comparative certification remains engine-backed.
Late-development nasty negatives stay linked to engine/probe bundles for comparative sanity.
Best-defense development rows must carry an engine bundle for support-only degradation checks without drifting into a large unrelated eval spike.
Initiative-window certification rows need engine bundles for denial and best-defense survival while staying close to engine-equal overall.
Near-miss initiative rows remain engine-backed because rival counterplay survival matters.
Initiative nasty negatives keep engine linkage for counterplay-denial audits.
Best-defense initiative rows must preserve engine bundle linkage for deferred fail-closed behavior while staying close to engine-equal overall.
Mobility comparison rows need engine bundles for comparative superiority rather than wording alone, while staying near-equal in overall eval.
Near-miss mobility rows stay engine-backed for comparative calibration.
Mobility nasty negatives keep engine bundles for symmetry and false-edge checks.
Thin mobility edges must carry engine bundles so support-only degradation remains testable while staying near-equal in overall eval.
Comparative king-fragility rows still carry engine bundles because certification stays comparative.
Near-miss fragility rows remain engine-backed for comparative burden checks.
King-fragility nasty negatives keep engine linkage for false asymmetry control.
Support-only comparative king-fragility rows retain engine/probe bundles.
Certified king-safety-edge rows require engine bundles for comparative and best-defense burdens.
Near-miss king-safety-edge rows remain engine-backed to prevent shell-only overclaim.
King-safety-edge nasty negatives keep engine linkage for phase and host-viability separation.
Deferred king-safety-edge rows must preserve engine bundle linkage for fail-closed best-defense review.
Mate-net certification may already be forcing, so the budget allows immediate mating lines.
Near-miss mate-net rows must stay outside immediate short mates.
Mate-net nasty negatives must stay outside immediate short mates.
Deferred mate-net rows must not already collapse into a short forced mate.
Material-harvest certification rows stay engine-backed for realized tactical conversion checks, with room for an intended but non-extreme clean conversion eval.
Near-miss material-harvest rows remain engine-backed because tactical realization is burdened.
Material-harvest nasty negatives keep engine linkage for trade-vs-harvest separation.
Support-only material-harvest rows preserve engine bundle linkage for thin-branch review without drifting into an extreme unrelated eval spike.
Winning-endgame certification rows require engine bundles for route survival and best defense, with room for an intended but non-extreme winning eval.
Near-miss winning-endgame rows remain engine-backed because route survival is unresolved.
Winning-endgame nasty negatives keep engine linkage for result-vs-advantage separation.
Deferred winning-endgame rows preserve engine bundle linkage for fail-closed route audits while staying near-equal overall.
Fortress-draw certification rows need engine bundles for hold survival rather than shell wording, and the calmer fortress corpus now stays inside a hold-oriented eval budget.
Near-miss fortress rows remain engine-backed and stay inside a hold-oriented eval budget so the missing shell burden, not a large eval spike, explains rejection.
Fortress nasty negatives keep engine linkage for entry-lane rejection checks while staying inside a hold-oriented eval budget.
Support-only fortress rows preserve engine bundles for thin hold branches while staying inside a hold-oriented eval budget.
Perpetual-check-holding rows keep engine bundles for repetition survival rather than attack prose, while staying near-equal overall.
Near-miss perpetual rows remain engine-backed because loose checks are not enough, and they must avoid drifting into a large unrelated eval spike.
Perpetual nasty negatives keep engine linkage for check-sequence false positives while staying near-equal overall.
Deferred perpetual rows preserve engine bundle linkage for best-defense break checks while staying near-equal overall.
Promotion-race certification rows need engine bundles for route survival over broad race wording, with room for an intended but non-extreme winning eval.
Near-miss promotion-race rows remain engine-backed because one-sided passers are insufficient.
Promotion-race nasty negatives keep engine linkage for blockade and reply-route checks.
Deferred promotion-race rows preserve engine bundle linkage for best-defense route survival review without drifting into an extreme unrelated eval spike.
Edge-file outpost rows stay inside the frozen outpost confound filter rather than leaning on unrelated tactical or material swings.
No-support outpost near misses must remain tactically calm so the support boundary stays explanatory.
Structural-path middlegame outpost rows must stay calm enough that the long pawn-support path, not tactical noise, explains the exact slice.
Queenless structural-path outpost rows must stay calm enough that the exact support-path slice, not a tactical swing, explains admission.
Black-polarity outpost rows must stay inside the frozen outpost confound budget rather than inheriting an unrelated eval cliff.
Black middlegame direct-support outpost rows must stay calm enough that direct support, not a broad tactical edge, explains the exact slice.
Challenge-restored black outpost negatives must stay tactically calm so the restored pawn challenge remains the rejection cause.
Edge structural-path outpost rows must remain within the frozen confound budget across a queen-bearing middlegame context.
Root candidate-passer rows use engine only to reject confounded boards where tactical release or unrelated eval spikes bury the local candidate-vs-passed law.
Candidate-passer near misses must stay calm enough that missing support/opposition balance explains rejection.
Same-rank-support candidate rows must stay within the frozen candidate-passer confound budget.
Edge candidate rows must stay calm enough that the local support/opposition balance, not a tactical release, explains admission.
Edge under-supported candidate near misses must keep missing support as the rejection cause.
Already-passed candidate negatives must remain calm so passed-pawn exclusion, not an unrelated eval spike, explains rejection.
Transition-phase same-rank-support candidates must stay inside the root confound budget.
Transition-phase under-supported near misses must stay calm enough that the support-count failure remains explanatory.
Transition-phase already-passed negatives must not borrow tactical or material noise to explain candidate rejection.
Black-polarity ahead-support candidates must stay inside the candidate-passer confound budget.
Black transition same-rank-support candidates must remain calm enough for the local balance law to own admission.
Black edge candidate rows must keep local passer balance, not a tactical release, as the exact slice.
Black edge under-supported near misses must keep the missing support/opposition balance as the rejection cause.
Black already-passed candidate negatives must stay inside the root confound budget so passed-pawn exclusion remains exact.
Zero-legal-move trapped-piece exact rows must stay outside immediate mate; cp magnitude may reflect the trapped piece itself and is not root truth.
Pawn-based trapped-piece negatives must stay inside the frozen confound budget so category rejection remains structural.
Heavy-piece zero-safe rook trap exact rows must stay outside immediate mate; cp magnitude may be intrinsic to the local trap.
Heavy-piece zero-safe queen trap exact rows must stay outside immediate mate; cp magnitude may be intrinsic to the local trap.
Heavy-piece one-exit trapped-piece near misses must stay calm enough that the safe-exit rule, not tactical collapse, explains rejection.
Heavy-piece one-exit trapped-piece near misses must stay calm enough that the safe-exit rule, not tactical collapse, explains rejection.
Black-side heavy rook trap exact rows must stay outside immediate mate; cp magnitude may be intrinsic to the local trap.
King-shelter near misses must stay calm enough that missing pawn-hole structure, not tactical collapse, explains rejection.
Polarity king-shelter rows must stay inside the frozen home-shelter confound budget.
Center-shield king-shelter exact rows must stay calm enough that the home-mask pawn hole, not a tactic, explains admission.
Center-shield pawn-cover near misses must keep pawn cover as the rejection cause.
Black-polarity center-shield king-shelter exact rows must stay inside the frozen home-shelter confound budget.
Black-polarity center-shield pawn-cover near misses must keep pawn cover as the rejection cause.
Out-of-regime negatives must stay calm enough that the home-shelter regime boundary remains explanatory.
Middlegame center-shield exact rows must stay calm enough that phase breadth does not borrow an unrelated eval spike.
